description_long: This is a three-seat sofa with a distressed, textured fabric in shades of gray and black, giving it a worn, urban look. The seat and back are adorned with a mix of loose cushions, including several in bold orange and patterned camouflage, adding visual interest and comfort. The sofa features slim, black metal legs at each corner, elevating it slightly off the ground and contributing to a modern, industrial aesthetic. Both armrests are padded and slightly flared, matching the sofa's overall fabric and height. A dark gray throw is draped over one arm and the back, enhancing the lived-in, casual vibe. The backrest is high and segmented by the arrangement of the cushions, with no visible tufting or decorative stitching on the main upholstery.
description: A modern, distressed gray sofa with loose, colorful cushions and slim black metal legs, featuring a casual, urban style. The mix of orange and patterned pillows and a draped throw add comfort and visual contrast.
description_view_0: Front view showing three seat cushions, a variety of loose back cushions in gray, orange, and camouflage patterns, and both padded armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sofa's depth, the thickness of the armrest, and the draped throw over the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, distressed gray back, the tops of the back cushions, and the throw hanging over the backrest.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the armrest, the arrangement of cushions, and the sofa's slim profile.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three individual seat cushions and at least five loose back cushions in varied sizes and colors, with additional throw pillows and a draped blanket; all cushions appear unattached and loosely arranged.
attribute_armrest_style: Both armrests are present, padded, and slightly flared outward, matching the sofa's fabric and extending to the height of the backrest, with a boxy, modern profile.
attribute_leg_design: Four slim, black metal legs positioned at each corner, straight and exposed, with a minimalist, modern design.
attribute_backrest_type: High, straight backrest segmented by the arrangement of loose cushions, with no visible tufting or decorative features on the main structure.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Distressed, mottled gray and black fabric with a worn texture; cushions include solid orange, camouflage, and geometric patterns, adding visual variety.
